easter-cake-in-air-fryer-pequerecetas.name: Easter Cake In Air Fryer
easter-cake-in-air-fryer-pequerecetas.original_name: Mona de Pascua en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 10 g de levadura fresca o 5 g de levadura seca
40 ml de aceite de oliva suave
Eggs (quantity according to the monkeys we make)
50 g of smoked sugar with a few drops of water

instructions: We put the flour in a big bowl. We add the yeast and mix with a fork to distribute it well. If dry yeast is used, simply add it directly with the flour. If we prefer to use fresh yeast, the ideal will be to crumple and dissolve them earlier into some temperate milk - taken from the total quantity - before adding them to the mixture. Once the yeast has been added, the other ingredients are added: olive oil, milk (or whatever remains of it if a part has been used to dissolve the fresh yeast), sugar, egg, an orange or lemon frying, a pint of azahar water and a pint of salt. It all intersects up to a homogenous and well integrated mass.

We amassed the dough for a few minutes onto a slightly pitted surface, until soft and elastic. If it's too sticky, you can add some more flour to work better. When it has a homogenous texture, we give them a ball shape with his hands, trying to make them smooth and well formed.

We put the dough ball into a slightly ground bowl with some oil and cover with a clean cloth or film paper. We let him rest in a hot place till his size's double. If you are in a hurry or the kitchen's cold, a very useful option is to use the airfryer if you have that option: you can program at about 30-40-3) for about 60 minutes, with only heat and with no fan. The mass can also be put up close to a heat source (as an off but warm radiator, or inside the off oven with light) for about 60 to 90 minutes, depending on room temperature.

As the dough grows, we cover the air fryer basket with baking paper suitable for airfryer. Once the mass has been lifted, we divide it, for instance. in 2 or 4 parts, depending how many "monkeys" we want to do and how big we give them. We form the monkeys as we best like them. In our case, we have chosen to make 2 medium monkeys and give them the classic round shape with a hole in the middle where we have put an egg, but you can give them as you wish. Let the little ones participate and enjoy!

With the monkeys already formed, we paint them with an egg yolk mixed with a tablespoon of milk and let them rise about 20 minutes more covered with a cloth. After 20 minutes we re-paint them with an egg and milk mixture and decorate with smoked sugar. To bake the monkeys into the airfryer, place them in the basket without them touching each other or one at a time depending on their size. Bake them at 165 ″ 3 ″ for about 20 minutes, or till they are golden and cooked from inside. The time may vary by the size of the Easter monkeys, so it's best to review them from time to time.

Once baked, we get them out of the airfryer and let them cool slightly onto a grid. Serve the hot or cold Easter monkeys. They are perfect for family sharing during snack or Easter breakfast. And as the Valencian tradition commands, they can also be given to our godfamilies.

easter-crown-teleculinaria.name: Easter Crown

ingredients.item: 1  saqueta de fermento de padeiro seco
To decorate powdered sugar and egg yarn

instructions: In a large bowl, dissolve the yeast into warm milk. Then add the sugar, butter, eggs, flour, salt and lemon zest to taste. Knead everything very well until you get a homogeneous mass. Let it light for an hour.

After the time indicated, re-shuffle the mass and extend it in a rectangle. Spread over the pumpkin candy and roll. Join the ends, forming a crown and dispose on a tray, sprinkled with flour. Let it take another 30 minutes.
Then brush with the yolk, previously mixed with milk, and sprinkle with granulated almond. Give some cuts on the board so you can see the stuffing.
Take it in the oven, preheated to 180oC, for about 35 to 40 minutes. Remove it from the oven and let it cool. Sprinkle with powdered sugar, decorate with egg threads and serve.

eat-michigan-salad.name: Eat Michigan Salad
instructions: In the container of a blender, combine mayonnaise, maple syrup, vinegar, and sugar. Cover and blend on low speed. Gradually pour in vegetable oil while mixing until fully incorporated. Taste and season accordingly with salt and pepper. Set aside.
In a large serving bowl, combine lettuce, cherries, apples, goat cheese and candied pecans. Toss with just enough dressing to coat, then serve with remaining dressing on the side.

egg-salad-with-mustard.name: Egg Salad With Mustard
instructions: Place eggs in a heavy pot and fill with water, about 1 inch above the eggs. Bring to a rolling boil over medium-high heat. Remove from heat and allow to stand for 15 minutes. Place in an ice bath for 5 minutes. Remove shells.
Chops eggs to desired consistency, either by hand or in a food processor.
Combine eggs, green onions, mayonnaise, relish, parsley, sweet hot mustard, and spicy brown mustard in a bowl and mix well.

egg-soaked-with-apple-from-alcobaca-merc.name: Egg Soaked With Apple From Alcobaça - Mercadona
egg-soaked-with-apple-from-alcobaca-merc.original_name: Encharcada de ovos com maçã de Alcobaça - Mercadona
instructions: Make a syrup of 400ml of water, 400g of sugar and 2 sticks of cinnamon.

Beat five yolks with an entire egg and coe. Remove the cinnamon sticks from the broth and add the eggs with an egg thread handle. With the help of a fork break the eggs and remove them with a skimmer. Repeat the process until the eggs are finished. Drain the drench on a pusher. Reserve.
Rake 3 apples and cook them slightly in the frying pan with 1/2 lemon juice.
Remove the apple from the fire and sprinkle with cinnamon. Reserve.
Serve the apple soaked, sprinkled with roasted almond.

egg-topped-soba-noodles-with-asparagus-a.name: Egg-topped Soba Noodles With Asparagus And Prosciutto

ingredients.item: Freshly grated parmesan cheese plus additional cheese shavings

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil in large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic; stir 30 seconds. Add prosciutto strips; cook until slightly crisp. Remove from heat. Set aside.
Heat 1 teaspoon oil in each of 2 nonstick skillets over medium heat. Crack 4 eggs into each skillet. Cook on 1 side until eggs begin to set, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat. Cover; set aside.

Cook soba noodles in large pot of boiling salted water 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add sliced asparagus to pot; cook until noodles are cooked through and asparagus is just tender, 2 to 3 minutes. Drain noodles and asparagus, reserving 1 cup cooking liquid.
Add drained noodles and asparagus to prosciutto mixture in skillet. Cook over medium heat until heated through, tossing and adding eserved cooking liquid by 1/4 cupfuls to moisten.

Remove skillet from heat. Add grated Parmesan cheese and remaining 1 tablespoon plus 1 teaspoon olive oil and toss to coat. Divide among 8 plates. Top each serving with 1 egg and cheese shavings. Serve immediately.

eggnog.name: Eggnog
instructions: Whisk 6 large egg yolks, 1 cup (200 g) sugar, and a pinch of kosher salt in a large punch bowl just until sugar is dissolved. Whisk in 3 cups whole milk, 2 cups dark rum, and 2 cups heavy cream. Cover and chill eggnog base at least 2 hours.

Just before serving, using an electric mixer, beat 6 large egg whites in a medium bowl until stiff peaks form. Gently fold into eggnog base. Finely grate whole nutmeg and cinnamon stick over as desired.
Do Ahead: Eggnog base can be made 6 hours ahead. Keep chilled.
Editor’s note: This homemade eggnog recipe was first printed online in December 2013; it has been updated for style. Head this way for more great punch recipes to make this holiday season →

eggplant-and-bacon-quiche-lezzet.name: Eggplant And Bacon Quiche
instructions: 1. Mix and knead all materials for dough.
2. Listen to half an hour.
3. Place the Kalıba broadcaster and pullout.
4. Közized Mosque
5. Place the index and language cheese on the rusts.
6. Beat milk and eggs.
7. Pour on the cheese.
8. Cook the grated cheese and cook until the oven, which is already heated to 200 degrees.
9. Serve hot.

eggplants-stuffed-with-fish-a-healthy-re.name: Eggplants Stuffed With Fish: A Healthy Recipe
eggplants-stuffed-with-fish-a-healthy-re.original_name: Berenjenas rellenas de pescado: una receta saludable

ingredients.item: 1/2 taza de queso rallado ((opcional, para gratinar))

instructions: Wash the eggplants and cut them in half, throughout. With a spoon, empty his pulp every half, leaving about a 1 cm border to maintain his shape. Reserve your pulp and place your eggplant halves onto an oven plate.
It purifies the oven at 180 and 3. He scattering the half of eggplant with some olive oil, salt and pepper. Hornea for 10 minutes to get them soft.
In a large frying pan, heat olive oil with medium heat. Soak the onion, garlic and red pepper till they are tender and frail. Add tomato and pulp from minced eggplant and cook till water evaporate.
Cut the fish into small pieces and add them to the vegetable mix in the frying pan. Cooking for 5-7 minutes, till the fish's cooked. Add salt, pepper and minced fresh parsley.
Remove eggplants from the oven and fill them with a mixture of fish and vegetables. Sprinkle with grated cheese if you wish. Baked again for 15- 20 minutes, till the cheese is golden and bubbling.
Let them rest a few minutes before they serve. You can decorate them with a little more fresh parsley to give them a touch of color.

empanadas-argiro.name: Empanadas
instructions: Add the flour, salt and butter cut into pieces.
Cut the butter into the flour with intermittent movement.
When the flour becomes like wet sand, add the egg and half the water and beat with the mixer in a break.
Add the water or milk a little while, until the ingredients are collected into thick pieces of dough.
The dough can be made in hand by putting the materials in the same order.
Remove the dough on a lightly floured bench and combine it with your hands. She must be stable and supple.
We split it into two pieces.
Open the dough in thin sheets with a mold on a lightly floured surface.
We cut 8 cm records. Place on top a spoonful of filling.
We close to a half moon by pushing all the air trapped in the license to go away.
Seal the edges by pinching and twisting the compounds.
Alternatively we take small pieces of dough and spread small leaves the size we want our pies to be.
We touch the empanadas (empanadas) on a baking pan lined with non-stick paper.
Brush with egg solution and bake until slightly golden for about 25 minutes.
Cook well warmed, in the air, at 180 °C, we will bake on the medium grill.
Alternatively, bake in the resistors, on the bottom rack, until about 30 minutes are browned.
Fill the empanadas with minced meat, cheeses, chicken or vegetables.
Basically fill them with what's left over and create a new wonderful recipe with this perfect dough.
To avoid opening the epanadas in baking, apply the dough with egg white. It works like glue and the edges of the dough will stick right into the compound.
The epanadas are better and nicer if before baking put them in the refrigerator for 30 minutes to freeze the dough well.

endive-watercress-and-orange-salad-telec.name: Endive, Watercress And Orange Salad
endive-watercress-and-orange-salad-telec.original_name: Salada de endívias, agrião e laranja
instructions: Choose the cresses, wash them and drain them. Peel two oranges and cut them into buds, eliminating the film that surrounds them. Discard the toughest part of the endives, wash the leaves (reserve some to decorate) and lay in a salad bowl. Add the cresses, orange and run corn and book.

In a tall glass, pour one of the remaining oranges, peeled (without white) and cut into pieces, the juice of the other orange, lime juice, olive oil, honey, mustard, cinnamon, salt and pepper. Grind well with the magic wand until the sauce is homogeneous.

Season the salad with the previous sauce or serve it in a separate saucer, slightly sprinkled with pepper. Sprinkle the salad with pumpkin seeds, have around the endive leaves that you have reserved and serve.

enjoy-a-moscow-mule-step-by-step-comeder.name: Enjoy A Moscow Mule: step by step
enjoy-a-moscow-mule-step-by-step-comeder.original_name: Disfruta de un clásico Moscow Mule: paso a paso

ingredients.item: Plates of lime and cucumbers (to decorate)

instructions: Fill a cup of copper with cubes and add a slice of ginger.
Add fresh light juice.
Fold vodka onto the ice.
Filling with ginger beer.
Gently remove to mix the ingredients.
Decorate with a slide of light and cum and, if you wish, add some mint leave to give an extra touch of freshness.
Enjoy!

ever-vegan-sushi.name: Ever Vegan Sushi
instructions: Combine rice, water, and a pinch of salt in a saucepan; bring to a boil. Stir once with a bamboo rice spatula or a thin wooden spoon. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and cook until all water is absorbed and rice is tender, about 20 minutes. Let cool.

Heat vegetable oil in a small saucepan over medium heat; add rice vinegar, sugar, and 1/8 teaspoon salt. Heat mixture until all sugar has dissolved and liquid begins to simmer. Remove from the heat and let cool until safe to handle, at least 10 minutes. Fold small portions of the cooled liquid slowly into the cooled rice until mixture is slightly wet and sticky but not gooey; you may not need all of the liquid.
Press excess liquid out of the tofu using a paper towel. Cut tofu into strips.
Heat olive oil in a small skillet over medium heat. Add tofu strips, onion, and garlic; cook and stir until tofu is golden brown, about 4 minutes per side.
Mix vegan mayonnaise and Sriracha together in a small bowl.

Lay a sheet of nori, rough-side up, on a sushi mat. With wet fingers, firmly pat a thick, even layer of prepared rice over the nori, covering it completely. Arrange tofu strips, avocado, cabbage, carrots, and cucumber in a line along the bottom edge of the sheet.

Roll nori and sushi mat over the filling. Remove the mat and wrap the roll with plastic wrap, twisting ends tightly to compress the roll. Refrigerate until set, 5 to 10 minutes. Repeat with remaining nori and filling.
Remove sushi roll from the plastic wrap, slice into pieces, and top with the Sriracha mayonnaise.
